title: Option to change MTU on default network interface (podman0) when running rootful
body:
### Feature request description

I would like an option to change the MTU of the podman0 interface, as the default 1500 MTU creates intermittent issues when the container communicates over a VPN (that usually runs a lower MTU).

### Suggest potential solution

Add a default_mtu option to the network table of the containers.conf file.

Another option would be to set the default MTU to 1400 instead of 1500, but i have no idea what the implications would be.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

It's possible rootless networking could fix it, but it still seems like an oversight not to be able to change the MTU as it means rootful containers communicating over vpn is unreliable.

### Additional context

_No response_

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
